docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWPORT CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP II, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-21-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DEBBIE JUAREZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY HANDED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED.
